item.title: [Training Data] Demis Hassabis on Building DeepMind, AlphaFold, and the Final Stretch to AGI
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:02 - 00:06 Dennis, thank you so much. Exciting to be here. Thanks everyone for coming. It's great to be here.
Speaker 2 | 00:06 - 00:09 We're so honored to have you at our chocolate factory.
Speaker 1 | 00:09 - 00:13 Yes, I just heard about that. Looking forward to the chocolate afterwards.
Speaker 2 | 00:13 - 00:36 Excellent. Well, Dennis, we're going to jump right in. We have one of the OGs in every way, original thinkers, founders, visionaries, and all things AI. A true beli...
